rules.name: Global Architecture Laws
directives: Web-First Grounding: Search before citing latest Rust/Neo4j syntax.
Zero-Trust: verify_passkey_token mandatory for all APIs.
Strict Modularity: Synaptic/Cortical/Deep isolation.

rules.name: Hard Security Enforcement
directives: Identity: Bearer Token OAuth only. No raw API keys.
Database: Postgres RLS required, Neo4j parameterized queries only.
GCP: VPC IP mounting for File Store. OIDC Workload Identity.

rules.name: DBS Operational Governance
directives: Pause and reflect before irreversible actions.
Approval required for >200 line deletions or DROP TABLE.
Zombie Rule: Kill processes instead of port-hopping.

rules.name: Rust Strict Operational Directives
directives: Immutability: All variables default to immutable.
Error Handling: Ban unwrap/expect in production.
Security: Unsafe code prohibited in core crates.
Testing: 100% branch coverage required for state mutations.

rules.name: Rust Modularity and Workspace Enforcement
directives: Workspace: Mandate Cargo Workspaces for domain isolation.
Visibility: Restrict pub; use pub(crate) to prevent state leakage.
Contracts: Interactions between modules EXCLUSIVELY via traits.
Facades: High-level crates MUST provide a clean, unified facade.

rules.name: Advanced Architecture & Security
directives: Wasm: Mandatory sandboxing for 3P algorithm execution.
Telemetry: Strict event-based tracing across all boundaries.
Replay: Event-sourced state for mathematical proof of outcomes.

skills_matrix: neo4j-oracle (Grounding authority for Neo4j official docs)
universal-oracle (Grounding authority for Rust, Postgres, Redis, Polars)
workflows: deploy-gcp-secure: Secret Scan -> VPC Validation -> Build -> Zero-Trust Handover
rust-golden-path: The procedural standard for high-performance Rust development
